name: Sludge Lurker
conditionImmunities: Blinded, Charmed, Deafened, Exhaustion, Frightened, Prone
senses: Blindsight 60 ft. (blind beyond this radius), Passive Perception 8

features.name: False Appearance
features.text: While motionless, the sludge lurker is indistinguishable from a normal puddle of sewer water.

features.name: Engulf
features.text: When a creature enters the lurker's space for the first time on a turn or starts its turn there, the lurker can attempt to engulf it. The creature must succeed on a DC 12 Dexterity saving throw or be engulfed. An engulfed creature is restrained and takes 2d6 acid damage at the start of each of its turns. A creature can escape with a DC 12 Strength check as an action.

summary.description: An ooze that disguises itself as an ordinary puddle of sewer water on the Blackflow tunnel floor. It lies perfectly still, too uniform in shape, slightly warm to the touch. When a creature steps into its space, it attempts to engulf and dissolve them with corrosive acid. A DC 14 Perception check spots the lurker before stepping in it.

encounters.description: Found lurking on the floor of the Blackflow tunnels, disguised as normal puddles.

groups.creatures: 1 sludge lurker disguised as a puddle

signs.text: A puddle on the tunnel floor that seems too still, too uniform in shape. It's slightly warm at the edges.
